title: Integration App access to Settings

posts.author: razme (Raz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m setting up a few board automations in my app and it would be useful to have access to board-level settings.

For example (and it’s not a great example), I want to have a column on the board that is used as a console to give users some information that about what the app is doing, once they click a button.

Say that this column is used in 3-4 automations and I don’t want to hardcode it, I want to be able to set it when the app is set up, and ideally I don’t want to carry it with me in each automation recipe.

What are some options of accessing a settings section?

Thanks so much!
Raz
